untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'Dealer ask price is >1.0% below estimated fundamental value' — fundamental value estimation is not available in allowed indicators; (2) 'Available size for purchase is ≥1.5x normal spread size' — dealer inventory and spread size metrics are not available; (3) 'Bid-ask spread has widened >0.75 standard deviations above 20-bar mean' — bid-ask spread data is not available in indicator set; (4) 'Price returns to within 0.5% of fundamental value' exit condition requires fundamental value estimation. Partial approximation attempted but core microstructure variables are missing.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a dealer microstructure/inventory-based trade requiring real-time bid-ask data, dealer inventory levels, and fundamental value estimation. The allowed indicator set is designed for price-action and technical analysis only. Cannot reliably translate without access to: (a) order book depth/inventory imbalances, (b) bid-ask spread time-series, (c) fundamental value estimation model, (d) dealer quote tracking.
